name: Chocolate Munchies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a cookie sheet.
2. Melt the chocolate chips in the top of a double boiler over hot water. Add the marshmallows and water. Stir until everything is melted. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. Sift together the already sifted flour, sugar, salt, and baking soda.
4. Slowly blend in the butter, brown sugar, egg, almond extract, and vanilla into the sifted ingredients. Mix well.
5. Stir in the oats, pecans, and melted chocolate into the batter. Blend thoroughly.
6. Drop dough by teaspoonfuls, about 2 inches apart onto the prepared cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 12-15 minutes. Remove from the cookie sheet immediately and cool on a rack.
